title: Oil And Gas Stocks Expected To Remain Strong: 5 Top Midstream Energy Stock Picks For 2022
text: Oil and gas stocks had a great year in 2021, and analysts expect the favorable energy market environment to continue in 2022. On Tuesday, Bank of America analyst Chase Mulvehill chose his five top stock picks for 2022 in the midstream oil and gas and MLP group.

title: Targa Resources Corp. to Participate in UBS Winter Infrastructure & Energy Virtual Conference
text: HOUSTON, Jan. 10, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) ("Targa" or the "Company") announced today that representatives from the Company will participate in investor meetings via video conference at the UBS Winter Infrastructure & Energy Virtual Conference on Tuesday, January 11, 2022.

title: 7 Top Energy Stocks With the Momentum to Continue Charging Forward This Year
text: Energy stocks had an exceptionally strong 2021 and it looks like 2022 is shaping up for more of the same from the sector. The post 7 Top Energy Stocks With the Momentum to Continue Charging Forward This Year appeared first on InvestorPlace.
